rationale: The cited meta-analysis is used only once to benchmark the magnitude of the focal study's estimated elasticity. In the results discussion, the authors compare their contract-change elasticity to prior elasticities for advertising, eWOM, and personal selling, citing Albers et al. (2010) as a reference point. The citing paper does not build its theory, hypotheses, design, or identification strategy on that paper, so the role is contextual rather than functionally central.
